name: Binding Asset Allocation Agreement

eligibility.description: Applies to 'applicable asset acquisitions' where a trade or business is transferred and the buyer's basis is determined by the price paid.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Buyers and sellers can enter into a written agreement to allocate the purchase price among specific asset classes (e.g., inventory, equipment, goodwill).
